name: Vyaay
description: Full-stack bill-splitting app used by friend groups to settle shared expenses in seconds — eliminating manual calculation and tracking.
highlights: Mobile-first UI with custom animations and interactive modals for intuitive expense entry
RESTful APIs on Node.js with PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM — handles concurrent group updates
Secure authentication with NextAuth.js supporting multiple providers

name: ChatCDP
description: AI-powered conversational analytics platform replacing manual dashboard queries — users get answers in natural language instead of writing SQL.
highlights: Conversational interface that translates natural language into analytics queries
Stripe-powered usage-based subscription billing with metered API calls
Scalable Flask backend handling real-time data aggregation from multiple sources

name: MedAssist
description: Healthcare assistant app that centralizes medical records and appointment scheduling, reducing no-shows with automated reminders.
highlights: Centralized medical records management with search and filter capabilities
Appointment scheduling system with conflict detection and notifications

name: Lets-Chat
description: Real-time chat application supporting instant messaging and group conversations with sub-100ms message delivery via WebSockets.
highlights: Real-time messaging with Socket.io — sub-100ms delivery latency
User authentication, friend system, and online status indicators

name: TutCart
description: Online education marketplace enabling teachers to publish courses and students to enroll and learn, with integrated payment processing.
highlights: Full backend architecture on MERN stack supporting course CRUD, enrollment, and progress tracking
Payment gateway integration processing course purchases with receipt generation
Teacher dashboard for course management, student analytics, and content uploads
